option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/slx_bg" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_hero" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_logo_circle" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name" android:padding="9dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/skillex_logo" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/mentee_dashboard_title" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/mentee_dashboard_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="-20dp" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/find_next_course" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16sp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/etCourseSearch" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_badge" android:hint="@string/search_courses" android:importantForAutofill="no" android:inputType="text" android:padding="12dp" android:textColorHint="@color/slx_text_sub" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSearchCourse" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/search" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search" />
</LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMentorList" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/chat_with_mentor" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/recommended_courses" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recyclerMenteeCourses" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:clipToPadding="false" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenteeProfile" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/profile" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_myplaces" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenteeLogout" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/logout" android:padding="12dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/slx_bg" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_hero" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_logo_circle" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name" android:padding="9dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/skillex_logo" />
<Space android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/btnMenteeProfile" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:contentDescription="@string/profile" app:backgroundTint="@color/white" app:srcCompat="@android:drawable/ic_menu_myplaces" app:tint="@color/slx_primary" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/mentee_dashboard_title" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/mentee_dashboard_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="-20dp" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/find_next_course" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16sp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/etCourseSearch" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_badge" android:hint="@string/search_courses" android:importantForAutofill="no" android:inputType="text" android:padding="12dp" android:textColorHint="@color/slx_text_sub" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSearchCourse" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/search" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search" />
</LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMentorList" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/chat_with_mentor" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/recommended_courses" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recyclerMenteeCourses" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:clipToPadding="false" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/slx_bg" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="@android:color/transparent" app:cardCornerRadius="0dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_hero" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_logo_circle" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name" android:padding="9dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/skillex_logo" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/mentor_dashboard_title" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/mentor_dashboard_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_badge" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/mentor_mode_active" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/mentor_analytics" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalCourses" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalEnrollments" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTopCourse" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStudentsEnrolled" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_sub" android:textSize="13sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/workspace" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMyCourses" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/my_courses" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_agenda" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMentorChats" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/mentees_chat" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMentorProfile" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/profile" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_myplaces" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMentorLogout" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/logout" android:padding="12dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/slx_bg" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="@android:color/transparent" app:cardCornerRadius="0dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_hero" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_logo_circle" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name" android:padding="9dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/skillex_logo" />
<Space android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/btnMentorProfile" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:contentDescription="@string/profile" app:backgroundTint="@color/white" app:srcCompat="@android:drawable/ic_menu_myplaces" app:tint="@color/slx_primary" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/mentor_dashboard_title" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/mentor_dashboard_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_badge" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/mentor_mode_active" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/mentor_analytics" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalCourses" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalEnrollments" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTopCourse" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStudentsEnrolled" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_sub" android:textSize="13sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/workspace" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMyCourses" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/my_courses" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_agenda" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMentorChats" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/mentees_chat" android:padding="12dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/slx_bg" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profile_title" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/etProfileName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:autofillHints="name" android:hint="@string/full_name" android:inputType="textPersonName" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/etProfileEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:autofillHints="emailAddress" android:hint="@string/email" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProfileRole" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_sub" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSaveProfile" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:text="@string/save_profile" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMenteeEnrollments" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="18dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/enrolled_courses" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvEnrolledCourses" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_sub" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMentorEarnings" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="18dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/mentor_earnings" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMentorEarnings" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_primary" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/mentor_profile_hint" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_sub" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/slx_bg" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profile_title" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/etProfileName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:autofillHints="name" android:hint="@string/full_name" android:inputType="textPersonName" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/etProfileEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:autofillHints="emailAddress" android:hint="@string/email" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProfileRole" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_sub" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSaveProfile" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:text="@string/save_profile" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMenteeEnrollments" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="18dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/enrolled_courses" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvEnrolledCourses" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_sub" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMentorEarnings" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="18dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/mentor_earnings" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_main" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMentorEarnings" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:textColor="@color/slx_primary" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/mentor_profile_hint" android:textColor="@color/slx_text_sub" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnProfileLogout" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/logout" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_lock_power_off" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
